base_prompt: Pixel-art sprite of dragonlord_phase_1_idle — a character (final_boss) from 1986 dragon quest. Dragonlord Phase 1 — purple-robed wizard form. Centered on magenta (#FF00FF) background, 8-bit or 16-bit pixel-art aesthetic, no anti-aliasing, chunky pixels. Single canonical pose (frame 0 of animation).
source_progression_description: Dragonlord Phase 1 — purple-robed wizard form; first phase of final boss. Will transform into Phase 2 dragon on defeat
